title: ANIMAL FRIENDSHIP
subtitle: 1st-Level Enchantment
front_body: This spell lets you convince a Beast that you mean it no harm. Choose a Beast that you can see within range. It must see and hear you. If the Beast's Intelligence is 4 or higher, the spell fails. Otherwise, the Beast must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be Charmed by you for the spell's duration (24 hours).
back_body:
Materials: A morsel of food.

At Higher Levels: You can target one additional Beast for each slot level above 1st.

title: BURNING HANDS
subtitle: 1st-Level Evocation
front_body: As you hold your hands with thumbs touching and fingers spread, a thin sheet of flames shoots forth from your outstretched fingertips. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 3d6 Fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
back_body:
The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

At Higher Levels: The damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

title: CHARM PERSON
subtitle: 1st-Level Enchantment
front_body: You attempt to charm a Humanoid you can see within range. It must make a Wisdom saving throw, and does so with Advantage if you or your companions are fighting it. If it fails the saving throw, it is Charmed by you until the spell ends (1 hour) or until you or your companions do anything harmful to it.
back_body:
The charmed creature regards you as a friendly acquaintance. When the spell ends, the creature knows it was charmed by you.

At Higher Levels: You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

title: COLOR SPRAY
subtitle: 1st-Level Illusion
front_body: A dazzling array of flashing, colored light springs from your hand. Roll 6d10; the total is how many Hit Points of creatures this spell can effect. Creatures in a 15-foot cone originating from you are affected in ascending order of their current Hit Points (ignoring unconscious creatures and creatures that can't see).
back_body:
Materials: A pinch of powder or sand that is colored red, yellow, and blue.

Starting with the creature that has the lowest current HP, each creature affected by this spell is Blinded until the end of your next turn. Subtract each creature's HP from the total before moving on.

At Higher Levels: Roll an additional 2d10 for each slot level above 1st.

title: DETECT MAGIC
subtitle: 1st-Level Divination (Ritual)
front_body: For the duration (Concentration, up to 10 minutes), you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you. If you sense magic in this way, you can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears magic, and you learn its school of magic, if any.
back_body:
The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood or dirt.

As a Ritual spell, it can be cast without expending a spell slot if your class allows you to cast rituals.

title: DISSONANT WHISPERS
subtitle: 1st-Level Enchantment
front_body: You whisper a discordant melody that only one creature of your choice within range can hear. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 3d6 Psychic damage and must immediately use its Reaction, if available, to move as far as its Speed allows away from you. On a successful save, the target takes half as much damage and doesn't have to move away.
back_body:
A Deafened creature automatically succeeds on the save.

At Higher Levels: The damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

title: FAERIE FIRE
subtitle: 1st-Level Evocation
front_body: Each object in a 20-foot cube within range is outlined in blue, green, or violet light. Any creature in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or also be outlined in light. For the duration (Concentration, up to 1 minute), outlined objects and creatures shed dim light in a 10-foot radius.
back_body:
Any attack roll against an affected creature or object has Advantage if the attacker can see it, and the affected creature or object can't benefit from being Invisible.

There is no additional scaling for this spell at higher levels.

title: HEALING WORD
subtitle: 1st-Level Evocation
front_body: A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains Hit Points equal to 2d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on Constructs or Undead.
back_body: At Higher Levels: The healing increases by 2d4 for each slot level above 1st.

title: HEX
subtitle: 1st-Level Enchantment
front_body: You place a curse on a creature that you can see. Until the spell ends (Concentration, up to 1 hour), you deal an extra 1d6 Necrotic damage to the target whenever you hit it with an attack. Also, choose one ability when you cast the spell. The target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability.
back_body:
Materials: The petrified eye of a newt.

If the target drops to 0 Hit Points before this spell ends, you can use a Bonus Action on a subsequent turn of yours to curse a new creature.

At Higher Levels: The duration becomes 8 hours at 3rd level, and 24 hours at 5th level.

title: THUNDERWAVE
subtitle: 1st-Level Evocation
front_body: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 15-foot cube originating from you must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 2d8 Thunder damage and is pushed 10 feet away from you. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and isn't pushed.
back_body:
In addition, unsecured objects that are completely within the area of effect are automatically pushed 10 feet away from you by the spell's effect, and the spell emits a thunderous boom audible out to 300 feet.

At Higher Levels: The damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

title: WITCH BOLT
subtitle: 1st-Level Evocation
front_body: A beam of crackling, blue energy lances out toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against that creature. On a hit, the target takes 2d12 Lightning damage.
back_body:
Materials: A twig from a tree that has been struck by lightning.

On each of your turns for the duration (Concentration, up to 1 minute), you can use your action to deal 1d12 Lightning damage to the target automatically. The spell ends if the target is ever outside the spell's range or if it has total cover from you.

At Higher Levels: Initial damage increases by 1d12 for each slot level above 1st.
